title: semverCompare
goal: Create src/semver.mjs exporting function semverCompare(a, b) returning -1, 0, or 1 comparing two "major.minor.patch" version strings by numeric field precedence.
notes: Golden must stress: numeric not lexical ordering (2.0.0 > 10.0.0 is FALSE, i.e. 10.0.0 > 2.0.0), equal versions -> 0, and a patch-only difference. Visible can test 1.0.0 vs 1.0.1.
